title: [LowerToHW] Error in firtool-1.54.0 Memory Lowering w/ Clock Type

features.name: memory with struct containing clock field as data type
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration where the data type is a struct containing a Clock field
features.snippet:
struct packed { logic clk; } clock_data_t;
 memory word[15:0]; // data type is struct with clock field

features.name: read port on memory with clock-typed data
features.description: Code should include a read operation from a memory where the data element contains a Clock type

features.name: write port on memory with clock-typed data
features.description: Code should include a write operation to a memory where the data element contains a Clock type
